name: multi-select
title: Multi-Select
description: Bounded multi-choice list with checkbox rows, optional typeahead filter, and a selection that survives filtering. The picker for "zero or more of these": files to stage, tags to attach, scopes to grant.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build options with []multiselect.Option{{Label, Hint, Value}}. Up/Down (or j/k) walks; Space or Tab toggles the row under the cursor; "a" toggles every visible row as a group; Enter commits with multiselect.ConfirmMsg{Selected, Values}; Esc cancels with multiselect.CancelMsg. Selection is keyed by resolved value so checks survive filtering. Turn on WithFilter(true) for substring typeahead and WithChecked([]string{...}) to pre-check.
